limitations: The representation pattern is admitted rather than derived from pure geometry.
statement: The admitted chiral representation ledger is the anomaly-free Standard Model gauge and matter ledger.
title: Standard Model Gauge Ledger

limitations: This is conditional on the admitted representation pattern and U(1) normalization.
statement: Hypercharges follow from Yukawa invariance and anomaly cancellation once the chiral pattern and Higgs-selected U(1) are admitted.
title: Hypercharge Derivation

limitations: The test audits the admitted one-generation ledger; it is not a derivation of the ledger itself.
statement: One-generation gauge and mixed anomaly residuals vanish in the implemented left-Weyl ledger.
title: Anomaly Cancellation

limitations: The index-three kernel has not been computed in this repository.
statement: Three generations are reduced to an index-three twisted Dirac kernel.
title: Three-Generation Index Condition

limitations: The protected spectrum is not yet computed, so this remains open.
statement: No fourth protected chiral generation is expected only after the protected kernel computation is completed.
title: No Fourth Protected Chiral Generation

limitations: Mode-selection rules are operational audits, not yet derived from the full action; numerical matches are screens, not predictions.
statement: Charged-sector Yukawa hierarchies are screened by the supplied universal overlap rule and mode ledger.
title: Yukawa Overlap Structure

limitations: The boundary operators Omega_f are ACTION_LINKED by symbolic phase factors but are not fully ACTION_DERIVED from variation or spectrum of the twisted Dirac/bundle action.
statement: The supplied boundary operators recover the charged-sector mode ledger without mass inputs.
title: Charged-Sector Mode Ledger

limitations: No independent CKM fit or dynamical derivation is implemented yet.
statement: CKM mixing is represented as left-handed up/down internal-basis misalignment.
title: CKM Screen

limitations: Neutrino masses are not part of the minimal Standard Model ledger in this repository.
statement: PMNS mixing is treated only as an effective neutrino-sector extension.
title: PMNS Effective Extension

limitations: Gate 29B implements one-loop RG matching scaffolding only; full two-/three-loop threshold matching remains OPEN and is not a completed theorem.
statement: The supplied gauge coupling relations are electroweak-scale matching screens with a one-loop RG scaffold.
title: Gauge Coupling Matching Screen

dependencies: reference Planck energy and alpha input
limitations: The calculation is a numerical screen and not an independent prediction.
statement: The supplied Hopf-scale formula numerically screens the electroweak scale.
title: Electroweak Scale Hopf Screen

limitations: Gate 32D formalizes sufficient proxy theorem assumptions A1-A7, but those assumptions are not proven in the full internal action; the theorem remains open.
statement: The no-extra-light-state condition has executable scalar and twisted-Dirac finite-basis proxy spectral audits, plus a formal sufficient theorem scaffold listing assumptions A1-A7.
title: H_T Proxy Spectral Gap

limitations: This is a finite-basis proxy construction, not the full curvature/profile operator in the complete action.
statement: A sufficient positive-semidefinite curvature/profile construction preserves the proxy Hopf gap on H_perp.
title: PSD Curvature/Profile Positivity

limitations: Gate 30B implements a scalar/topographic decoupling scaffold only; full action-level scalar decoupling remains OPEN and not proven.
statement: Scalar/topographic decoupling has a finite-basis scaffold, but remains to be proven in the full action.
title: Scalar Decoupling

limitations: No independent topological proof is implemented.
statement: The trace U(1) topological condition remains an open structural input.
title: Trace U(1) Topological Condition

limitations: The current repository is a conditional audit and screen suite.
statement: The repository must not claim a rigorous first-principles derivation of the Standard Model from pure geometry alone.
title: Forbidden Pure-Geometry Derivation Claim

limitations: No confinement proof is implemented or audited.
statement: The repository must not claim a proof of Yang-Mills confinement.
title: Forbidden Yang-Mills Confinement Claim

limitations: Only proxy spectral-gap and positivity audits are implemented.
statement: The repository must not claim the no-extra-light-state theorem is complete before the full H_T spectrum is computed.
title: Forbidden Completed No-Extra-Light-State Claim

limitations: Neutrino masses are treated only as an effective extension.
statement: The repository must not claim neutrino masses are part of the minimal Standard Model.
title: Forbidden Minimal-SM Neutrino-Mass Claim

limitations: Implemented numerical results are screens unless upgraded by future derivations.
statement: The repository must not claim numerical matches are predictions before independent mode-selection rules are derived.
title: Forbidden Numerical-Prediction Claim
